meanings.definition: not based on fact; unreal; - F.D.Roosevelt
examples: the falsehood about some fanciful secret treaties
to create a notional world for oneself

meanings.definition: not based on fact or investigation
examples: a notional figure of cost helps in determining production costs

meanings.definition: indulging in or influenced by fancy
examples: all the notional vagaries of childhood

meanings.definition: being of the nature of a notion or concept
examples: a notional response to the question
